conservative.name: Strafing Talon Strike
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Furies
Not engaged with target, target within close range

success.description: The fury swoops down upon the target, tearing at it with its vicious claws. The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers 1 fatigue
The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers fatigue and stress equal to the number of critical wounds he is currently suffering from

boon.description: The target suffers the Cowed condition for 2 rounds

reckless.name: Strafing Talon Strike
reckless.requirements: You must be able to fly, not be engaged with the target, and be within close range

success.description: You swoop down upon the target, tearing at it with vicious claws or other weapons. The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers 1 fatigue
The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers fatigue and stress equal to the number of critical wounds he is currently suffering from

boon.description: If the target's Toughness is currently fatigued, he suffers wounds equal to the amount of fatigue he has in excess of his Toughness score
